reasons: Angela can attach to Aldous from anywhere, giving him shield and follow-up support during his global dive.
Aldous benefits from Angela because his ultimate often places him deep inside enemy formation.

proof.summary: Aldous commits to a target with global pressure, while Angela protects and supports the dive with Heartguard.
worksBestWhen: Angela saves Heartguard for Aldous's real engage.
Aldous chooses an isolated or low-peel target.
failureCases: Aldous dives into multiple enemies without backup.
Aldous targets a hero with strong defensive response.

reasons: Floryn's global heal can support Aldous even when he dives far from the rest of the team.
Aldous benefits from emergency healing because his engage often forces him to absorb retaliation after landing.

proof.summary: Aldous commits across the map, while Floryn gives global sustain that can keep him alive during the landing fight.
worksBestWhen: Floryn holds Bloom for Aldous's commit or teamfight turn.
Aldous dives when enemies have already used key burst.
failureCases: Aldous is chain-controlled before the heal matters.
Floryn uses Bloom before Aldous commits.
Aldous dives into anti-heal or heavy burst.

reasons: Selena gives Aldous extra map control through traps and long-range catch pressure.
Abyssal Arrow can create a safer landing target for Aldous.

proof.summary: Selena helps identify and control a target path, while Aldous uses that information to choose a safer global commit.
worksBestWhen: Selena prepares traps around the target's escape path.
Aldous follows a confirmed catch instead of forcing blind engages.
failureCases: Selena misses arrow and Aldous still commits.
The enemy groups before Aldous lands.
The target has defensive tools ready.

reasons: Kaja can suppress and drag a target, giving Aldous a safer target to finish.
Aldous adds burst follow-up after Kaja forces a priority enemy out of position.

proof.summary: Kaja locks the target first, while Aldous uses his burst and chase pressure to complete the pickoff.
worksBestWhen: Kaja catches a priority damage dealer.
Aldous waits until Kaja confirms the suppression.
failureCases: Aldous ults before Kaja has a clean target.
Enemy teammates collapse onto Aldous after landing.

reasons: Tigreal can start a fight and force enemy attention before Aldous chooses his dive target.
Aldous can follow Tigreal's engage by targeting a backline hero during the chaos.

proof.summary: Tigreal creates the teamfight opening, while Aldous uses the distraction to enter on a vulnerable enemy.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal engages before Aldous reveals his target.
Aldous chooses a backline target separated from peel.
failureCases: Aldous dives before Tigreal controls the fight.
The enemy saves suppression, knockback, or burst for Aldous's landing.
